positive: Stylized retro-futuristic mountain landscape with a lone, minimalist hot air balloon floating above the peaks. The scene uses strong, saturated primary colors (cyan, orange, deep blue) against a clean white sky. The art style should mimic high-contrast silkscreen screen printing on apparel, emphasizing bold silhouettes and graphic shapes. Use a limited color palette of 3-5 colors for maximum print readability. Central composition, highly vector-graphic, clean lines, perfect for a t-shirt print. Flat graphic design aesthetic, vaporwave meets mid-century modern illustration, high detail, perfect symmetry, 8k.
